pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 17 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.6+ requires Java 17 for compilation and runtime; using Java 8 properties will cause build failures or runtime incompatibilities with the new parent POM.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM version from 2.3.0.RELEASE to 2.6.6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.3 is incompatible with Java 17 and many modern dependencies; upgrading is required to support the new JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Cloud BOM version to align with the new Spring Boot version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud Hoxton is incompatible with Spring Boot 2.6; using the old version causes dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors.
